raw_consumer_statement:
I submitted a report for a quality issue with a house my family stayed in over XXXX. Our vacation was ruined due tot he state of the house. The individual I spoke with in the end, I had to be transferred twice to managers, said they understood and had experienced something similar, but they still could not move forward. He said the bank/mastercard won't allow it. 

The original issue lies with the company XXXX XXXX, which we attempted to speak with but the resolution they offered was insulting considering what we went through. So we tried with the card itself, and they came back with the story that it couldn't be completed.
